doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document inverts Illinois law—tenants have a right to cure by paying within 5 days and cannot be forced to vacate without a court eviction order, so no genuine HUD/AG bulletin would state these "obligations."
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 98
REASON: This misstates Illinois law—a 5-day notice gives tenants the right to cure by paying rent, and landlords must file and win an eviction suit before tenants must vacate; the document inverts tenant rights in a way no real HUD/AG bulletin would.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 98
REASON: The document inverts Illinois law—tenants have a right to cure by paying within 5 days and cannot be forced to vacate without a court eviction order, so no genuine HUD/AG bulletin would state these "obligations."
